Althaea officinalis, also known as marshmallow plant, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. The health benefits of Althaea officinalis include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and providing relief from coughs and sore throats due to its mucilaginous properties. The bioactive constituents of Althaea officinalis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and mucilages, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Althaea officinalis is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various skin conditions and respiratory issues.
